message:
fix: gate tracing assertions behind feature flag, clippy/lint cleanups

- fabric.rs: Wrap tracing event assertions in cfg(feature = "tracing-integration")
  block so the oracle test passes when the feature is disabled (tracing_compat::info!
  is a no-op without it, so events are never captured and the assertions panic).
  Added cfg(not(...)) branch to suppress the unused-variable warning on `events`.
- kafka_consumer.rs: Add clippy::too_many_lines allow on KafkaConsumer::poll() to
  silence the lint without refactoring the inherently complex polling loop.
- dns/resolver.rs: Remove unnecessary .clone() on query_name in test helper — the
  value is moved into the hash lookup and not used afterward.
- signal.rs: Widen inject_test_signal visibility from pub(crate) to pub so
  integration tests in external test crates can synthesize signals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
